3107670.name: Don't Jump
3107670.description:
Time is fractured. Timelines have splintered into unstable, corrupted realities that twist until they collapse. You are a Jumper, a time janitor sent to cross these broken worlds, clean what remains, and survive long enough to return.

Every jump is different. Every failure erases everything you carried back. The lab grows more unstable with each return, and the reason you are pulled back remains unknown.

WARNING: Jumper Protocol

  • Enter at your own risk. Portals lead to corrupted timelines filled with hazards, enemies, and anomalies.

  • Scavenge to survive. Collect energy and resources before collapse.

  • Complete objectives. Puzzle-like challenges offer huge rewards, but failure is permanent.

  • Manage your energy. Open portals, fabricate gear, and even respawn.  Every choice consumes power.

  • 1–6 players. Work together or fall apart. Survival depends on coordination.

Failure to comply will result in total timeline collapse.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
